model: Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct (open model; Track 3 allows any open model)

logprobs_vote.question: Best management for TP53 R175H breast cancer? (A/B/C/D)
logprobs_vote.note: Real single-token logprobs from the vLLM endpoint (top_logprobs), softmaxed over the A/B/C/D options — genuine logit-bias voting, not JSON parsing.

batch_fp8.note: Six specialist prompts as one batched (single-tensor) vLLM request vs six sequential calls, with FP8 KV-cache.

speculative_decoding.verdict: Honest negative result: on a 7B model this bandwidth-rich MI300X already decodes at ~227 tok/s, so speculative-decoding overhead (draft + verify) exceeds its benefit for free-form clinical generation. Speculative decoding pays off on much larger, memory-bound targets. We report this rather than manufacture a speedup.

hardware_action.note: Real autonomic GPU action: allocated 24 GB on the MI300X, then freed it + emptied the HIP cache — verified by real rocm-smi before/after.
